title: JobExtractionOutput
description: Schema for LLM extraction output (Tier 2 fields only). Tier 1 fields are extracted by regex_extractor.py.

evidence_item.description: An extracted item with a source quote from the description for grounding.

technical_skills.description: Named technologies, frameworks, languages required — each with a source quote from the description.

soft_skills.description: Interpersonal and professional soft skills explicitly mentioned.

nice_to_have_skills.description: Named technologies mentioned as optional/preferred (not required) — each with a source quote.

benefits.description: Specific tangible benefits — each with a source quote from the description.

tasks.description: Main responsibilities of the role — each with a source quote from the description.

job_family.description: Best-matching job family from the canonical taxonomy (validated by remap, not by enum).
